title: Legacies
description: Adventure awaits in Legacies - a  unique reimagining of the familiar survival style
body:
[![Legacies Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_header.webp)
](https://wiki.pixeldreamstudios.net/modpacks/legacies/)

[![Legacies Trailer](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_trailer.webp)
](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xMamrQGYF-g)

_Legacies is a unique, heavily-custom modpack focused on recapturing and reimagining the best aspects of Minecraft's familiar style. Featuring several hundreds of hours and over a year of development, Legacies intends to faithfully fulfill the vanilla style in a unique, bold and expansive way - with a plethora of custom mods and integration created throughout the course of development in order to accomodate for this goal in order to provide a comprehensive experience like no other._

[![Legacies Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_description.webp)
](https://wiki.pixeldreamstudios.net/modpacks/legacies/)
- **Expanded Gear Progression**. In Legacies, you'll progress in an all-new fashion. From Wood to Stone, from Copper to Iron, from Gold to Rose and even from Diamond to Remnant, Netherite or Featherzeal - Legacies provides much more expansive and varied paths for Progression
- **A Wilder World**. The Overworld comes alive with a plethora of new biomes - from the Frozen Caves to the Golden Forest, there are 20+ new, high-quality biomes to discover. Furthermore, you can expect to see many vanilla biomes faithfully upgraded - from Pine trees in the taiga to Willow trees in the Swamp
- **Music, Melody, Atmosphere**. A massive update to the vanilla soundtrack, with dozens of new, fitting tracks in different biomes whilst retaining all the original Minecraft songs. Additionally, expect to discover new music discs and listen to new ambient sounds during your time in Legacies
- **Easy Multiplayer**. With support for e4mc & a global public server, you can easily play with friends - no server required!
- **Upgraded Nether**. Expect new materials, loot, structures, overhauled worldgen, nether ore veins & more!
- **Enchanting Reimagined**. Enchanting and repairing systems have been completely overhauled. Earn and discover dozens of new & vanilla-reworked Enchantments, Curses and Blessings, as you collect Tomes, use Altars and customise the many attributes of your own Enchanting Table.
- **Into the End**. Collect and repair Fractured Eyes, reach the overhauled Stronghold and fight a renewed Ender Dragon. Venture forth to the outer End isles - you best be prepared to explore a vast and unfamiliar landscape filled with new biomes, mobs, structures, terrain and much more...
- **Custom Combat**. Quivers allow all-new ways to perform ranged combat. Shields have blocking metres, enchantments and parry-timing mechanics. Hunger and health regeneration have been heavily changed. Range, speed and damage of all equipment has been modified. Experience a highly-developed unique iteration of combat!
- **Structures Rebuilt**. Overhauled Dungeons. Catacombs and Remnants. Ruins and Obelisks scattered across the world. There are so many new and updated structures to discover - all of which are fittingly rare. Remade Strongholds. In Legacies - structure clutter is no problem - new structures encourage exploration to find all-new rewards, from the Katana to the Boomerang to mystical Tablets of power, and yet both new and vanilla structures are made fittingly rare to ensure that an essential balance of isolation and discovery are preserved.
- **Overhauled Advancements**. An overhaul of the vanilla advancement system featuring 100+ custom advancements, with dedicated tabs to guide you through the main progression/story of Legacies alongside tabs for the Overworld, Nether, End and Adventure. Both new and returning advancements reward XP upon completion and integrate with Legacies' mods to provide a unified experience where you can progress through the game and complete challenges. 
- **Uniquely Integrated Experience**. Legacies has an absurd (hundreds of hours worth) focus on integration - in order to feel like you're playing a whole, unified game, not a collection of assorted mods.
- **Much, much more!** Mooblooms and Penguins. Rebalanced armor. Hooks and Knives. Collectible sherds, trims and lore books. There are so many new biomes, blocks and mobs to discover while you enjoy Legacies' many sweeping changes to core gameplay systems - you really must check the pack out for yourself!

[![Legacies Wiki](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_wiki.webp)
](https://wiki.pixeldreamstudios.net/modpacks/legacies/)

**For more info, [check out the Legacies wiki!](https://wiki.pixeldreamstudios.net/modpacks/legacies)**

_Legacies is evocative of the same things that make Minecraft great, and doesn't try to bury them under countless unnecessary features and clutter - with many custom mods made for Legacies such as Progression Reborn or Legacies and Legends - you'll find a faithfully vanilla-style yet endlessly replayable and unique world to enjoy._

Give the pack an install and check it out for yourself - I promise you won't regret it in the slightest.

Let the adventure begin!

- Rebel459, author of Legacies

[![Legacies Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/5Xrf9Huqem)

**You can join my personal Discord server [linked here](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5)**, or say to all of us at Pixel Dream using the banner above!.

[![Legacies Ko-Fi](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_kofi.webp)
](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

[![Legacies Bisect](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Legacies/MP_Legacies_promo.webp)
](https://tinyurl.com/bisect-hosting)

<details>
<summary>Related Projects</summary>

All projects here were developed by me (Rebel459) for the express purpose of making this modpack an unforgettable, perfected experience.

Enjoy the adventure!

[Legacies and Legends](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacies-and-legends) - a complete atmosphere and world overhaul, from structures, to lore and collectibles, to the soundtrack and music.

[Enchants and Expeditions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchants-and-expeditions) - a reimagining of both vanilla's enchanting and repairing systems.

[Bloom](https://modrinth.com/mod/bloom) - new farming, flowers & over a dozen beautiful biomes.

[Combat Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-reborn) - a comprehensive update to vanilla combat.

[Progression Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/progression-reborn) - thoughtfully overhauling vanilla's progression system.

[End Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-reborn) - an expansion to both the End dimension and late-game gear.

[Fractured](https://modrinth.com/mod/fractured) - a rework of the journey to reaching the End dimension, primarily through requiring the collection and repairing of Fractured Eyes found throughout the world.

[Remnants](https://modrinth.com/mod/remnants) - a content-focused mod which introduces a sprawling new structure - the Remnants, and a plethora of new loot to find within.

</details>
